name: MenuGroup
description: Information about a menu group configured for this restaurant, including an array of menu items contained in the group.

name.description: A descriptive name for this menu group, for example, "Appetizers" or "Sandwiches".

guid.description: A unique identifier for this menu group, assigned by the Toast POS system.

description.description: An optional short description of this menu group.

itemTags.description: An array of `ItemTag` objects that are assigned to this menu group. Item tags are used to assign identifying characteristics, for example, vegetarian, gluten-free, or alcohol.

menuGroups.description: An array of the `MenuGroup` objects that are children of this menu group. The array is empty if the menu group has no child menu groups.

menuItems.description: An array of the `MenuItem` objects contained in this menu group.
